vendorPartnership.referralFee: 3–5% of first-year software or services revenue
vendorPartnership.terms: Paid by vendor only after client purchase when applicable
vendorPartnership.disclosure: Referral economics must be disclosed to preserve trust
vendorPartnership.guardrail: Assessment must remain vendor-neutral regardless of partner economics
